acceptance_criteria: 1) RLM module compiles and runs with PyO3 runtime under agreed feature policy. 2) Runtime/loop interfaces are converged and mergeable. 3) Required V1 slices (context/previews, turn policy hardening, sub-LM tools, fallback extractor) are complete. 4) Integration tests cover end-to-end submit, error feedback, budget behavior, and fallback extraction.
description: Land RLM V1 as a Predict-driven conversational module with persistent PyO3 REPL runtime, typed SUBMIT flow, sub-LM tools, and extraction fallback. Track architecture/runtime merge seams, stabilization work, and integration test coverage needed for merge readiness.
design: Keep all turns optimizer-visible through Predict leaves, preserve immutable chat history, and execute model code in persistent Python globals with typed submit slot handoff. Merge runtime and architecture branches by converging on one runtime trait surface and one feature-gating policy. After V1 lands, eliminate duplicated type-walking/conversion paths in favor of Facet-based core infrastructure.
title: RLM V1: Predict-driven conversational loop with PyO3 REPL
